name: dtm
description: DevStream is an open-source DevOps toolchain manager

subcommands.name: apply
subcommands.description: Create or update DevOps tools according to DevStream configuration file

subcommands.name: completion
subcommands.description: Generate the autocompletion script for dtm for the specified shell

subcommands.name: bash
subcommands.description: Generate autocompletion script for bash

subcommands.name: fish
subcommands.description: Generate autocompletion script for fish

subcommands.name: powershell
subcommands.description: Generate autocompletion script for powershell

subcommands.name: zsh
subcommands.description: Generate autocompletion script for zsh

subcommands.name: delete
subcommands.description: Delete DevOps tools according to DevStream configuration file

subcommands.name: destroy
subcommands.description: Destroy DevOps tools deployment according to DevStream configuration file & state file

subcommands.name: develop
subcommands.description: Develop is used for develop a new plugin

subcommands.name: create-plugin
subcommands.description: Create a new plugin

options.description: Specify name of the plugin to be created

subcommands.name: validate-plugin
subcommands.description: Validate a plugin

options.description: Specify name of the plugin to be validated

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Download needed plugins according to the config file

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: This command only supports listing plugins now

subcommands.name: plugins
subcommands.description: List all plugins

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Show is used to print plugins' configuration templates or status

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.description: Show configuration information

options.description: Print a template config, e.g. quickstart/gitops/

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: Show status information

options.description: Show all instances of all plugins status
Specify id with the plugin instance

subcommands.name: upgrade
subcommands.description: Upgrade dtm to the latest release version

subcommands.name: verify
subcommands.description: Verify DevOps tools according to DevStream config file and state

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: Print the version number of DevStream

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Help about any command
